building.sylvan-town.sylvan.blacksmith.d: The Blacksmith provides your armies with First Aid Tents.
building.sylvan-town.sylvan.capitol.desc: The Capitol earns your kingdom 4000 gold per day.
building.sylvan-town.sylvan.capitol.name: Capitol
building.sylvan-town.sylvan.castle.descr: The Castle adds two arrow towers, fortifies your town's defenses, and doubles base creature growth.
building.sylvan-town.sylvan.castle.name: Castle
building.sylvan-town.sylvan.citadel.desc: Including a 50% increase to base creature growth, the Citadel adds a keep, and other terrain obstacles, to a town's defenses.
building.sylvan-town.sylvan.citadel.name: Citadel
building.sylvan-town.sylvan.cityHall.des: The City Hall allows you to purchase town structures and earns your kingdom 2000 gold per day.
building.sylvan-town.sylvan.dwellingLvl1: The Magical Forest allows you to recruit Fairies.
building.sylvan-town.sylvan.dwellingLvl2: The Cottage allows you to recruit Hunters.
building.sylvan-town.sylvan.dwellingLvl3: The Belvedere allows you to recruit Blade Dancers.
building.sylvan-town.sylvan.dwellingLvl4: The Tree House allows you to recruit Dryads.
building.sylvan-town.sylvan.dwellingLvl5: The Floating Altar allows you to recruit Priestesses.
building.sylvan-town.sylvan.dwellingLvl6: The Stone Circle allows you to recruit Forest Defenders.
building.sylvan-town.sylvan.dwellingLvl7: The Mountain Lair allows you to recruit Mountain Giants.
building.sylvan-town.sylvan.dwellingUpLv: The Upgraded Magical Forest allows you to recruit Sylvan Fairies.
The Upgraded Cottage allows you to recruit Master Hunters.
The Upgraded Belvedere allows you to recruit War Dancers.
The Upgraded Tree House allows you to recruit Sylvan Dryads.
The Upgraded Floating Altar allows you to recruit High Priestesses.
The Upgraded Stone Circle allows you to recruit Forest Wardens.
The Upgraded Mountain Lair allows you to recruit Ancient Giants.
building.sylvan-town.sylvan.fort.descrip: The Fort provides your town with defensive walls.
building.sylvan-town.sylvan.fort.name: Fort
building.sylvan-town.sylvan.grail.descri: The presence of the Forest Guardian increases weekly creature growth by 50%, provides an additional 5000 gold per day, and increases the power of all spells by 50%.
building.sylvan-town.sylvan.grail.name: Forest Guardian
building.sylvan-town.sylvan.horde1.descr: The Fairy Garden increases weekly growth of Fairies and Sylvan Fairies by 10.
building.sylvan-town.sylvan.horde1.name: Fairy Garden
building.sylvan-town.sylvan.horde2.descr: The Forest Guild increases weekly growth of Hunters and Master Hunters by 3.
building.sylvan-town.sylvan.horde2.name: Forest Guild
building.sylvan-town.sylvan.mageGuild1.d: Entering the Mage Guild will allow a visiting hero to learn the spells kept within.
building.sylvan-town.sylvan.mageGuild2.d: Entering the Mage Guild will allow a visiting hero to learn the spells kept within.
building.sylvan-town.sylvan.mageGuild3.d: Entering the Mage Guild will allow a visiting hero to learn the spells kept within.
building.sylvan-town.sylvan.mageGuild4.d: Entering the Mage Guild will allow a visiting hero to learn the spells kept within.
building.sylvan-town.sylvan.mageGuild5.d: Entering the Mage Guild will allow a visiting hero to learn the spells kept within.
With the Marketplace, you can buy and sell resources (exchange rates increase with each Marketplace you own).
building.sylvan-town.sylvan.resourceSilo: The Resource Silo provides you with an additional +1 crystal each day.
building.sylvan-town.sylvan.special1.des: Stonehenge increases the Spell Power of a visiting hero by 1.
building.sylvan-town.sylvan.special1.rew: The Stonehenge teach you new ways to focus your magical powers (+1 Power)
building.sylvan-town.sylvan.special2.des: Aurora Borealis adds an extra spell to the Mage Guild.
building.sylvan-town.sylvan.special3.des: The Altar of Distortions allows heroes of this town to learn the Distortions skill.
building.sylvan-town.sylvan.special3.onE: Your hero attempts to master the lore of the Distortions in vain. Already possessing many skills, your hero is unable to learn anything new.
Your hero attempts to master the lore of the Distortions before realizing they are unable to read them. It appears as though this art is only accessible to locals and competent scholars.
building.sylvan-town.sylvan.special3.onV: Your hero has already mastered the lore of the Distortions.
building.sylvan-town.sylvan.special3.rew: Do you want your hero to master the lore of the Distortions?
building.sylvan-town.sylvan.special4.des: The Well fully restores the spell points of a visiting hero.
building.sylvan-town.sylvan.special4.rew:
{Magic Fountain}

A drink from the fountain has restored your spell points to maximum.
building.sylvan-town.sylvan.tavern.descr: The Tavern increases morale for troops defending the city.
building.sylvan-town.sylvan.tavern.name: Tavern
building.sylvan-town.sylvan.townHall.des: The Town Hall allows you to purchase town structures and earns your kingdom 1000 gold per day.
The Village Hall allows you to purchase town structures and earns your kingdom 500 gold per day.
creatures.sylvan-town.evlv4.description:
{Entangling}

After attacking, has a 25% chance to cast Bind on the target.
creatures.sylvan-town.evlv4up.descriptio:
{Entangling}

After attacking, has a 25% chance to cast Bind on the target.
creatures.sylvan-town.spriggan.descripti:
{Protection from Earth}

Can cast Protection from Earth on an allied stack once per combat.
faction.sylvan-town.sylvan.name: Sylvan
hero.sylvan-town.aerwen.biography: Aerwen calmly walks the fine line between life and death, so calmly that it unsettles even her allies. Where others see fallen warriors, she sees only a brief pause in the forest's rhythm. With whispered ancient words and the touch of old magic, she returns the departed to life, though each such return carries a price only she is willing to pay. Some say Aerwen bargains with powers beyond the forest thickets, but she only smiles and reminds them: in nature, nothing disappears forever.
hero.sylvan-town.aerwen.name: Aerwen
hero.sylvan-town.aerwen.specialty.descri: Spell bonus: Resurrection. The hero casts this spell with increased effect.
hero.sylvan-town.aerwen.specialty.name: Resurrection
hero.sylvan-town.alatar.biography: Alatar has walked more roads than most know exist, and a few that are better left untrodden. Years beneath the forest canopy sharpened his instincts until broken twigs and bent grass speak to him as clearly as a map to another. Few can rival his eye for the hidden, and fewer still can slip away unseen once Alatar has found their trail.
hero.sylvan-town.alatar.name: Alatar
hero.sylvan-town.alatar.specialty.descri: The hero's scouting radius increases by 1 for every 6 levels.
hero.sylvan-town.alatar.specialty.name: Scouting
hero.sylvan-town.beren.biography: While others of his people think of bow and branch, Beren long ago mastered the quiet power of gold. Careful trade, hidden agreements and a web of allies far beyond the forest keep coin flowing into the Sylvan Alliance's coffers. Some question his methods, but none can argue with the result: where Beren appears, prosperity soon follows.
hero.sylvan-town.beren.name: Beren
hero.sylvan-town.beren.specialty.descrip: Provides your kingdom with an additional 350 gold per day.
hero.sylvan-town.beren.specialty.name: +350 Gold
hero.sylvan-town.beren.specialty.tooltip:
{Gold}

Increases kingdom income by 350 gold per day.
hero.sylvan-town.faelin.biography: Faelin moves to a rhythm heard only by the smallest spirits of the forest. Wherever she goes, glittering flocks of Fairies and Sylvan Fairies gather around her, their playfulness turning into a dangerous weapon. Under her command they become swifter, more precise and unexpectedly deadly. Many see them as harmless lights in the thicket, until Faelin turns their dance into a storm.
hero.sylvan-town.faelin.name: Faelin
hero.sylvan-town.faelin.specialty.descri:
{Fairies and Sylvan Fairies}

Increases the Speed of Fairies and Sylvan Fairies by 1, and their Attack and Defense by 5% for every 2 hero levels (rounded up).
hero.sylvan-town.faelin.specialty.name: Fairies
hero.sylvan-town.forlong.biography: Forlong's calm manner often deceives enemies, until their blades begin to glance uselessly from the warriors under his protection. His magic does not flash or roar like lightning or flame; it settles over allies with the strength of ancient bark and living stone. Beneath his ward, even the most fragile warriors of the Sylvan Alliance endure blows that would break others.
hero.sylvan-town.forlong.name: Forlong
hero.sylvan-town.forlong.specialty.descr: Spell bonus: Stone Skin. The hero casts this spell with increased effect.
hero.sylvan-town.forlong.specialty.name: Stone Skin
hero.sylvan-town.galion.biography: Galion carries a quiet confidence, as though fate itself leans slightly in his favor. In battle, his magic weaves fine threads of fortune through his allies, turning misses into true strikes and desperate positions into sudden victories. He claims it is not luck, but harmony with the world's natural flow; few argue after seeing it.
hero.sylvan-town.galion.name: Galion
hero.sylvan-town.galion.specialty.descri: Spell bonus: Fortune. The hero casts this spell with increased effect.
hero.sylvan-town.galion.specialty.name: Fortune
hero.sylvan-town.gwendolin.biography: Gwendolin is certain that survival depends not on luck, but on preparation. She is a master of armor, both forged and worn, and every blow against her troops meets resilience instead of ruin. Under her command, even the light gear of the Sylvan Alliance seems to turn strikes aside.
hero.sylvan-town.gwendolin.name: Gwendolin
hero.sylvan-town.gwendolin.specialty.des:
{Armorer}

Receives a 5% per level bonus to the Armorer skill.
hero.sylvan-town.liminel.biography: Liminel moves with a quiet radiance that inspires all who follow her. Among Priestesses and High Priestesses, her presence sharpens both mind and spirit, turning calm devotion into swift and precise action. Near Liminel, even amid the chaos of battle, it feels as though the forest itself is urging them forward.
hero.sylvan-town.liminel.name: Liminel
hero.sylvan-town.liminel.specialty.descr:
{Priestesses and High Priestesses}

Increases the Speed of Priestesses and High Priestesses by 1, and their Attack and Defense by 5% for every 5 hero levels (rounded up).
hero.sylvan-town.liminel.specialty.name: Priestesses
hero.sylvan-town.lindariel.biography: Lindariel is the unbending will of the forest where shield meets steel and none shall pass. Under her command, Forest Defenders and Forest Wardens grow ever more steadfast, their discipline hardening with every battle. She teaches not with words, but by example: remain unbroken, vigilant and always ready.
hero.sylvan-town.lindariel.name: Lindariel
hero.sylvan-town.lindariel.specialty.des:
{Forest Defenders and Forest Wardens}

Increases the Attack and Defense of Forest Defenders and Forest Wardens for each level after 6.
hero.sylvan-town.merenwen.biography: Merenwen is rarely where her enemies expect her, and often exactly where they most fear seeing her. Instinct and a subtle feel for the land let her lead troops just as swiftly along forest paths as across open ground. While the enemy is still preparing its defense, Merenwen is already near.
hero.sylvan-town.merenwen.name: Merenwen
hero.sylvan-town.merenwen.specialty.desc: Receives a 5% per level bonus to the Logistics skill.
hero.sylvan-town.merenwen.specialty.name: Logistics
hero.sylvan-town.mirthanë.biography: Mirthanë is a rare bridge between grace and might, leading sacred priestesses and mighty giants with equal confidence. Her presence brings harmony to forces almost impossible to unite: priestesses act with greater precision, while giants unexpectedly gain swiftness. With every season, her bond with these ancient allies grows stronger.
hero.sylvan-town.mirthanë.name: Mirthanë
hero.sylvan-town.mirthanë.specialty.desc:
{Mountain Giants and Ancient Giants}

Increases the Speed of Mountain Giants and Ancient Giants by 1, and their Attack and Defense by 5% for every 7 hero levels (rounded up).
hero.sylvan-town.mirthanë.specialty.name: Mountain Giants
hero.sylvan-town.orianna.biography: Orianna leads not from the rear, but from the very edge of the battlefield where arrows fall like rain. Under her command, even the youngest archers shoot truer and stand firmer. In her hands, simple volleys become a crushing storm.
hero.sylvan-town.orianna.name: Orianna
hero.sylvan-town.orianna.specialty.descr:
{Hunters and Master Hunters}

Increases the Attack and Defense of Hunters and Master Hunters for each level after 2.
hero.sylvan-town.orianna.specialty.name: Hunters
hero.sylvan-town.rumil.biography: Rumil sees more than most, far more than he cares to explain. To him magic is not hidden; it merely waits to be noticed. In battle he watches enemy spellcasters closely, unravelling their secrets as easily as others loose arrows. More than once, spells aimed at him soon turn against the enemy instead.
hero.sylvan-town.rumil.name: Rumil
hero.sylvan-town.rumil.specialty.descrip: Receives a 5% per level bonus to the Eagle Eye skill.
hero.sylvan-town.rumil.specialty.name: Eagle Eye
hero.sylvan-town.silvanne.biography: Silvanne commands not armies, but the forest itself. In her presence, Dryads gather in restless circles and Sylvan Dryads awaken with renewed strength, answering a call older than memory. Those who underestimate her understand too late: near Silvanne, the forest is never indifferent.
hero.sylvan-town.silvanne.name: Silvanne
hero.sylvan-town.silvanne.specialty.desc:
{Dryads and Sylvan Dryads}

Increases the Speed of Dryads and Sylvan Dryads by 1, and their Attack and Defense by 5% for every 4 hero levels (rounded up).
hero.sylvan-town.silvanne.specialty.name: Dryads
hero.sylvan-town.thranduil.biography: Thranduil's magical power grows with the grace of the forest itself: unseen, patient and steady. A simple spell in his hands often blooms into something far more powerful, as though the air itself amplifies his will. Allies have long learned to trust this gift; enemies rarely live long enough to understand its nature.
hero.sylvan-town.thranduil.name: Thranduil
hero.sylvan-town.thranduil.specialty.des:
{Sorcery}

Receives a 5% per level bonus to the Sorcery skill.
hero.sylvan-town.tindomiel.biography: Tindomiel walks among the hidden veins of the earth as though they whisper her name. Where she lingers, rare crystals emerge from roots and stone, as if the world's depths answer her quiet call. She does not claim these riches as her own, only saying that the forest gives what is needed when it is needed.
hero.sylvan-town.tindomiel.name: Tindomiel
hero.sylvan-town.tindomiel.specialty.des:
{Crystal +1}

Increases kingdom income by 1 crystal per day.
heroClass.sylvan-town.herbalist.name: Herbalist
heroClass.sylvan-town.pathfinder.name: Pathfinder
skill.sylvan-town.distortions.descriptio:
{Advanced Distortions}

Combat distortion creates an aura that gives a 20% chance to ignore an enemy spell.

{Basic Distortions}

Combat distortion creates an aura that gives a 10% chance to ignore an enemy spell.

{Expert Distortions}

Combat distortion creates an aura that gives a 30% chance to ignore an enemy spell.
skill.sylvan-town.distortions.name: Distortions
